libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image run coverage on JDK 25, configure the generated test/native runtime with `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`, extending the existing 5.0.0 Netty 4.2.x workaround to 5.0.1. Use in-process Vert.x `HttpServer`/`WebClient` loopback tests for requests, JSON/body codecs, forms, multipart upload, redirects, cookies/session, and caching; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is in native-image run, so local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative.
If generated tests add HTTPS/HTTP2, DNS, proxy, or native transport coverage, additional Netty/JDK behavior may surface, but this is not required for normal Web Client coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x Core 5.0.1 and Netty 4.2.2.Final, same Netty 4.2.x line as the existing 5.0.0 test, which already requires Java 25 native-run system properties. No extra Maven dependency or Docker service appears necessary for meaningful coverage; loopback Vert.x HTTP server/client tests are sufficient.
